drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f1 <= 1, f0 not in (100), $b0_0_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T3($p0_0.isF3(), "", -1000000007, true));
end
rule "R1"
salience -4
no-loop
when
    accumulate( T0(f3 in (true, false), $s1_0 : f1); $a1_0 : average($s1_0) )
    accumulate( T0(f2 == true, $s1_1 : f1); $a1_1 : max($s1_1) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -9
when
    ( not T3() and not T0(f3 == false, f2 not in (false, true, true)) )
    or
    ( not T3() and not T0(f3 == false, f2 not in (false, true, true)) )
then
    insertLogical(new T3(false, "a", 100, false));
end
name: fz_7_2142
